description_long: This object consists of a group of various scissors, each with distinct handle colors and blade shapes, arranged in a line. The scissors feature both symmetrical and asymmetrical handles, with some designed for right-handed or ambidextrous use. The handles are made of colored plastic, while the blades are metallic, with some scissors having pointed tips and others rounded or blunt for safety. The finger loops vary in size and shape, with some accommodating multiple fingers and others designed for precision. The pivot joints are visible and appear to be simple rivets or screws, typical for household or office scissors. No visible brand markings or logos are present on any of the scissors.
description: A collection of assorted scissors with colorful plastic handles and metallic blades, featuring various handle shapes and blade tip styles. The group includes both pointed and rounded tip scissors, with visible pivot joints and no brand markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of scissors, highlighting the diversity in handle colors, shapes, and blade tip styles.
description_view_1: Side view where the scissors appear as thin vertical lines, making the handles and blades less distinguishable.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the scissors, with handle colors and blade shapes still visible but mirrored from the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the scissors as thin lines, with minimal detail visible.
attribute_handle_type: Handles are mostly symmetrical, made of colored plastic, and generally ambidextrous; some may have slight ergonomic shaping but no visible padding or special grip features.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Simple visible rivet or screw pivot joints, not adjustable, standard for household scissors.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Finger loops vary in size and shape, with some equal and others different; most are rounded, sized for one or two fingers, and lack soft inserts or textured surfaces.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Blade tips include both pointed and rounded (safety) styles, suitable for general cutting and safe use.
